## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what you want to add or change. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this useful? What does it enable that isn't possible today? -->

## Proposed approach

<!-- How might this be implemented? Which crate(s) would be affected? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider and why did you prefer this one? -->
